sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112389" key="frourhto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρουρ-ητός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n112389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">watched, guarded,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.230</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
